analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of sanity.io/docs crawled 4,551 pages across 4,681 discovered URLs, achieving 100% crawl coverage within scope. Critical issue: 173 confirmed broken internal documentation links require immediate remediation. API reference coverage stands at 54.05% across 1,660 detected API pages, indicating significant documentation gaps. Example code reliability is strong at 93.05%, and 87.89% of pages include last-updated metadata. Overall audit confidence is 79.74%, with link verification confidence reduced to 65.61% due to 72 unverified URLs blocked by authentication or rate-limiting.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage (100.02%) with 4,551 pages successfully indexed within scope limits
Strong example code reliability at 93.05%, indicating well-maintained code samples
High freshness metadata coverage at 87.89% of pages showing last-updated timestamps
1,660 API pages successfully detected with clear API documentation structure
Single-product topology provides coherent documentation architecture
risks: 173 confirmed broken internal documentation links create poor user experience and navigation failures
API reference coverage at 54.05% leaves nearly half of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
72 unverified links due to authentication/rate-limiting/server blocks represent unknown documentation quality
SEO/geo issue rate of 9.03% affects discoverability and search engine performance
Link verification confidence at 65.61% indicates significant uncertainty in link health assessment
4,681 discovered pages vs 4,551 crawled suggests 130 pages were inaccessible or out-of-scope
47 trap URLs skipped may indicate crawler confusion or documentation structure issues

prioritized_actions.action: Repair all 173 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Investigate and document the 72 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits to determine if they are legitimate or broken
Expand API reference documentation to improve 54.05% coverage rate, targeting missing endpoints and methods
Address SEO/geo issues affecting 9.03% of pages to improve search discoverability
Analyze 130 discovered-but-not-crawled pages and 47 trap URLs to identify structural or navigation problems

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or whether documentation matches actual product behavior
72 URLs blocked by authentication, rate-limiting, or server restrictions could not be verified; actual broken link count may be higher
API coverage detection relies on pattern matching and may miss unconventional API documentation structures or misclassify pages
Audit cannot assess documentation completeness for features, use cases, or business requirements not visible in page structure
Freshness metadata presence does not guarantee content is actually current or reflects latest product versions
